grant_title: APDA Massachusetts Chapter Community Grant Program
project_area: Parkinson’s Health & Wellness Initiatives, including Wellness Programs, Support Groups, Educational Initiatives, and exercise programs with certified professionals
demographic_requirements: Programs must benefit people living with Parkinson’s disease (PD) in Massachusetts
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations or individuals in Massachusetts creating programs that increase access to and affordability of wellness, support, and educational initiatives for people with Parkinson’s disease. Programs must include certified fitness instructors, physical therapists, or other accredited professionals for wellness/exercise programs.
